name: Shrimp Sauce - Pasta and Co. by Request
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Rock shrimp or small prawns, Shelled and uncooked
1/2 tsp Dried rosemary or 2 tsp fresh rosemary, chopped
1/2 tsp Dried oregano OR 4 tsp fresh basil, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the bay leaves and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 3-5 minutes per side.
4. Remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add a bit more oil if needed, then stir in the lemon juice, rosemary (fresh or dried), oregano (fresh or dried), paprika, salt, and cayenne pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
6. Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
7. Return the shrimp to the pan and add the butter. Stir to coat everything evenly.
8. Add the spinach leaves and tomatoes, then stir to combine.
9. Continue cooking until the vegetables are tender and the sauce has thickened, about 5-7 minutes.
10. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
11. Serve hot with pasta or spaghetti, if using.
